  Issues with `cursor-override` and `risky-typecombo-override` trigger

  `src/data/risky-typecombo-overrides.yaml` and open a PR.

  Requires the Cursor GitHub app on this repository.

## Risky typeCombo override

> **You** — submitted this override from the Tagging Schema Browser.
> **Tagging Schema Browser** — generated this issue body with the YAML snapshot.
> **Cursor agent** — will merge the snapshot into the override file in a separate PR.

_Submit to trigger a Cursor cloud agent. The agent opens a PR with `Closes #<issue-number>` and label `schema-override` (auto-merges after CI). Follow `.cursor/skills/apply-schema-override/SKILL.md` (`kind: risky-typecombo`)._

_Paste the pre-filled body from the browser when opening from a preset detail panel._
